macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Core PCE Prices QoQ Final Matches Expectations at 2.7%
items.summary: The final US Core PCE Prices for the quarter came in at 2.7%, aligning with consensus and prior figures, amid upcoming PPI data releases. Other US indicators include GDP Sales QoQ Final at 0.4% and Real Consumer Spending QoQ at 2.0%.

items.title: US PPI MoM Rises to 0.7%, Core PPI MoM at 0.5%
items.summary: US Producer Price Index MoM increased to 0.7% against 1.3% expected, with Core PPI MoM at 0.5% and Core PPI YoY at 3.9%. PPI YoY stood at 3.4%.

items.title: February CPI Rose 0.3% MoM, 2.4% YoY; Core at 2.5%
items.summary: US Consumer Price Index for February increased 0.3% seasonally adjusted and 2.4% over 12 months, with core CPI less food and energy at 2.5%. Latest BLS data also shows Unemployment at 4.3% and Payrolls +178,000 in March.

items.title: Inflation Remained High in February Before Iran War Impact
items.summary: A key inflation measure rose 0.4% in February, with core at 3% YoY, indicating firming prices prior to gas price spikes from the Iran war. Upcoming March CPI expected to show 0.9% MoM jump to 3.4% YoY.

items.title: South Africa Manufacturing Production Contracts -2.2% MoM
items.summary: ZA Manufacturing Production MoM fell -2.2% against 1.9% expected, with YoY at levels below prior 2.8%.

items.title: Germany New Car Registrations Surge 16% YoY
items.summary: DE New Car Registrations YoY jumped to 16% from 3.8% prior, beating 1.0% forecast.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Tests $73K Resistance Amid Market Recovery and $342M Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin briefly hit $73,145 before consolidating around $72,000, up about 2% in 24 hours, as the crypto market cap rose 1.19% to $2.45-$2.5T. Total liquidations reached $342M, mostly shorts at $250M, triggered by a short squeeze amid Middle East de-escalation.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Climbs Above $2.5T on $250M Short Liquidations and ETF Inflows
items.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $343M net inflows and Ethereum ETFs $85M on Thursday, supporting price gains after prior outflows. The rally followed news of Iran considering Bitcoin for oil shipments and positive Asian stock sentiment.

items.title: TON Network Activates Catchain 2.0 Update, Boosting Throughput Tenfold
items.summary: The TON blockchain successfully activated Catchain 2.0 on April 9, creating blocks six times faster with transactions under one second. This marks a major performance upgrade for the network.

items.title: Bitcoin Hovers Near $72K as Traders Weigh Fragile US-Iran Ceasefire
items.summary: Bitcoin traded around $71,696-$72,000 up 1% in 24 hours amid a conditional two-week US-Iran truce tied to reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Traders remain cautious despite $56M in bearish position liquidations on Bybit.

items.title: Top Performers: Dash (+17.45%), Zcash (+16.61%), Theta (+10.97%) Lead Gains
items.summary: Privacy coins and altcoins rallied strongly with Dash up 17.45%, Zcash 16.61%, and Theta Network 10.97% over 24 hours. Underperformers included VeChain (-1.18%) and Hedera (-0.99%).

items.title: Unitas Labs Raises $13.33M for Sustainable Onchain Yield Infrastructure
items.summary: Unitas Labs secured $13.33M in seed funding from Amber Group, SevenX Ventures, and Bixin Ventures to build transparent, market-neutral yield generation protocols addressing yield compression issues.

items.title: Bhutan Prepares to Sell $22.7M in Bitcoin; Cango Offloads 2,000 BTC
items.summary: Bhutan transferred 319.7 BTC worth $22.7M to wallets for sale, per Lookonchain. Publicly listed miner Cango sold 2,000 Bitcoin for $143M in March to repay debts.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: MIT CSAIL Unveils CompreSSM: New Algorithm Compresses AI Models During Training for Speed and Efficiency
items.summary: Researchers from MIT CSAIL and collaborators developed CompreSSM, an algorithm that compresses AI models during training, achieving up to 1.5x faster training and maintaining accuracy on benchmarks like CIFAR-10 and Mamba architectures without post-training pruning.[1]

items.title: Study Reveals Exponential Quantum Advantage in Machine Learning Tasks with Small Quantum Computers
items.summary: Caltech, Google Quantum AI, and MIT researchers demonstrate that small quantum systems with under 60 qubits can process massive datasets for classification and dimension reduction using far less memory than classical computers, based on simulations.[3]

items.title: Meta Signs $21 Billion AI Infrastructure Deal with CoreWeave
items.summary: Meta agreed to a $21B contract with cloud provider CoreWeave to bolster its AI operations, highlighting massive investments in AI compute infrastructure.[2]

items.title: Mount Sinai AI Model Predicts CPAP Impact on Heart Risk for Sleep Apnea Patients
items.summary: Mount Sinai researchers created a machine learning tool that estimates whether CPAP therapy will benefit or harm cardiovascular risk in obstructive sleep apnea patients, advancing precision medicine.[4]

items.title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy Rejects AI Bubble Fears, Defends Heavy Investments
items.summary: In his annual shareholder letter, Amazon CEO Andy Jassy dismissed concerns of an AI bubble and reaffirmed commitment to AI investments despite scrutiny.[2]

items.title: Microsoft Launches 'Copilot Code Red' Overhaul to Accelerate AI Against Rivals
items.summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella initiated an emergency overhaul of Copilot to counter competitors in the AI race, as reported in recent developments.[2]

items.title: Valve Reportedly Developing SteamGPT AI for Support and Anti-Cheat
items.summary: Valve is quietly building SteamGPT, an AI tool for customer support and anti-cheat functions in Steam, according to rumors and reports.[2]

items.title: Global GPU Shortage Hits Even Nvidia's Own Research Teams
items.summary: Nvidia faces internal GPU shortages amid a broader crunch reshaping AI development, impacting its research efforts.[6]

items.title: Microsoft Report: AI Drives Rapid, Uneven Workplace Changes
items.summary: Microsoft's New Future of Work 2025 report highlights AI transforming collaboration and productivity, with benefits unevenly distributed across professions.[7]

items.title: Roadmap Proposed to Integrate AI with Experimental Materials Discovery
items.summary: Researchers outline a framework using graph neural networks and LLMs to bridge AI models, databases, and lab workflows for faster materials discovery, emphasizing FAIR data principles.[5]

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Windrose Pirate Survival Game Announces Release Date
items.summary: The upcoming survival game Windrose, a pirate-themed title, has revealed its release date during recent announcements. It was highlighted alongside updates for Enshrouded and new reveals like Don't Starve: Elsewhere and FrostRail.[1]

items.title: Enshrouded Update 8 Details Revealed
items.summary: Enshrouded's next major update, Update 8, has a confirmed release window announced in recent survival game news roundup. Other survival titles like Don't Starve Elsewhere, FrostRail, and Away Days (Oxygen Not Included spin-off with co-op) also featured prominently.[1]

items.title: Top Marathon Player Caught Cheating in Esports Scandal
items.summary: The leading player in Marathon has been exposed for cheating, sparking discussions in the gaming community. This incident highlights ongoing issues in competitive gaming integrity.[5]

items.title: Pokemon TCG Announces Pitch Black Set for July Release
items.summary: New Pokemon Trading Card Game set 'Pitch Black' featuring Mega Dark CR EX is set for release on July 17, with prereleases from July 4-12. Market updates show fluctuations in related card prices like Chaos Rising and Prismatic SPC.[4]

items.title: RAID Shadow Legends Old Fusion Champions Dominate New Meta
items.summary: Eight legacy fusion champions have surged in relevance with the latest RAID Shadow Legends meta shift, prompting players to revisit these picks for competitive advantage.[2]

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Prototype Chip Boosts Data Center Power Management Efficiency
items.summary: Engineers at UC San Diego have developed a new chip design to improve how GPUs convert and manage power in data centers, addressing rising energy demands.

items.title: Ultra-Thin Camera Achieves 140-Degree View Without Lens Protrusion
items.summary: A KAIST research team has developed breakthrough ultra-thin camera technology that solves the persistent camera protrusion issue in smart devices.

items.title: New Hydrogen Fuel Cell Design Advances Clean Energy Technology
items.summary: UNSW researchers have redesigned hydrogen fuel cells to solve a critical flaw, bringing clean energy solutions for aviation and heavy transport closer to reality.

items.title: Safer Sodium Battery Eliminates Thermal Runaway Risk
items.summary: Researchers have developed a sodium battery design with a heat-triggered polymer barrier that prevents thermal runaway, addressing critical safety concerns in battery technology.

items.title: Laser-Written Microsupercapacitors Transform Natural Leather into Wearable Energy Devices
items.summary: Researchers have developed an eco-friendly laser technique to turn natural leather into flexible, wearable energy storage devices for sustainable electronics.
